name: Waifu Survivors
short_description: Advance with badass heroines, customize your skills, and face bosses with unique powers in Waifu Survivors. Fight against hordes of monsters, explore diverse maps, and engage in epic battles. Get ready for an exciting journey!
detailed_description:
Face hordes of relentless monsters and adapt your skills to overcome rising challenges, while developing your own story with unique characters.

Enter the challenging and vibrant world of Waifu Survivors, a fantastic universe full of action and strategy to evolve and face monsters.

  • Each match allows you to customize your character with exclusive powers, each with its own quirks.

  • Progress with different characters, creating unique builds for each challenge.

  • Explore varied maps and experiment with distinct abilities, each with its own peculiarities.

  • Survive the monsters and uncover the stories of each character to advance.

  • Get ready for an intense and exciting journey, full of challenges and adrenaline.

supported_languages:
English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian, Arabic, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
